generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded our local preparedness programs are. The recent drills in our county showed critical gaps - and that's with our volunteers giving 110%. Imagine what a few more dedicated federal dollars could do. We're talking about basic readiness here, not some expensive new weapons system. Our neighbors in [nearby state] got smart funding increases last year, and their response times improved by 30%. We can't afford to fall behind on this basic security. #CivilDefenseMatters #CommunitySafetyFirst
